title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 05 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 05 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 05 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/12/2025
The DCE iron ore futures contract on the DCE traded in the doldrums today. As the contract rollover shi ed to I2605, it closed at769 yuan, down 0.77% from the previous trading day. Traders showed a moderate willingness to sell.
